scripts.build: node scripts/buildFastJsonPatch.cjs && rollup -c rollup.config.cjs && node scripts/copyAssets.cjs && node scripts/rewriteHtmlForManifest.cjs && node scripts/generateValidationManifest.cjs && node scripts/auditHtmlAssetReferences.mjs --fix
scripts.test:critical: node tests/ampacity.test.mjs && node tests/racewayRoute.test.cjs && node tests/analysis.test.cjs && node tests/serverSecurity.test.mjs && node tests/collaborationServer.test.mjs && node tests/projectDisplayScheduler.test.mjs && node tests/revitImporter.test.mjs && node tests/validation.test.mjs && node tests/validationManifest.test.mjs && node tests/studyBasis.test.mjs
scripts.test:enterprise-auth: node tests/auditLog.test.mjs && node tests/rbac.test.mjs && node tests/oidc.test.mjs
scripts.e2e:critical: playwright test --config playwright.config.cjs playwright-tests/workflow.spec.js playwright-tests/oneline.spec.js playwright-tests/nextFeatures.smoke.spec.js --grep "create DB-01|dirty-state prompts|editing a source voltage|smoke:"
scripts.e2e:next-features-export: playwright test --config playwright.config.cjs playwright-tests/nextFeatures.integration.spec.js --grep "AT-CE-04|submittal xlsx export downloads expected file"
